active_objective: Repair the Wishing Tree before the forest loses its last safe shelter.

current_reward.name: Wishwood Cog
current_reward.summary: A carved wooden cog that can unlock root-powered machines.

character_status.Captain Starlight: Guiding the team toward the next repair mission.
character_status.Puzzle Goblin: Causing trouble and hiding the real danger.
character_status.Wise Owl: Teaching the team how repaired magic changes the world.

cliffhanger: When the Wishing Tree steadies, its roots pull back and uncover a tiny door with a star-shaped slot.

secret_mission.description: Side Quest: teach someone one clue or fact you learned on this level.
